Normal Attacks.name: Standing Heavy Punch
Normal Attacks.notes: Can hold down the button to charge the attack, data listed as 'no charge...max charge'.

Normal Attacks.name: Standing Heavy Kick
Normal Attacks.notes: Can hold down the button to charge the attack, data listed as 'no charge...max charge'. Partial charges that do not transition to knockdown are always still the same +1 on hit / -3 on block, any transition into knockdown is always knockdown +36 on hit / +1 on block. As of March 2026 patch: expanded hurtbox in front on frame 12 onward.

Normal Attacks.name: Crouching Heavy Punch
Normal Attacks.notes: Can hold down the button to charge the attack, data listed as 'no charge...max charge'. Full Juggle State on charged hit. Has a 9 frame input buffer during recovery as of December 2024 patch. Hold version can be cancelled into Super as of the June 2025 patch.

Normal Attacks.name: Crouching Medium Kick
Normal Attacks.notes: As of March 2026 patch: on-hit from +3 to +5.

Normal Attacks.name: Crouching Heavy Kick
Normal Attacks.notes: Can hold down the button to charge the attack, data listed as 'no charge...max charge'.

Unique Attacks.name: Forward + Medium Punch
Unique Attacks.notes: As of March 2026 patch: startup from 10 to 9 frames.

Unique Attacks.name: Back + Heavy Punch
Unique Attacks.notes: Can hold down the button to charge the attack, data listed as 'no charge...max charge'.

Unique Attacks.name: Malleus Breaker (Down-Forward + Heavy Punch)
Unique Attacks.notes: Can hold down the button to charge the attack, data listed as 'no charge...max charge'.

Unique Attacks.name: Falx Crusher Kick (Forward + Heavy Kick)
Unique Attacks.notes: Can hold down the button to charge the attack, data listed as 'no charge...max charge'.

Target Combos.name: Light Punch, Light Punch
Target Combos.cancel: First Hit: -- Second Hit: Special, Super
Target Combos.notes: Second hit does not combo unless counter hit.

Target Combos.name: Medium Punch, Medium Punch
Target Combos.cancel: First Hit: -- Second Hit: Special, Super

Target Combos.name: Heavy Two Hitter (Heavy Punch, Heavy Punch)
Forward + Medium Punch, Heavy Punch
Target Combos.notes: As of March 2026 patch: startup from 10 to 9 frames.

Target Combos.name: Down-Forward + Heavy Punch, Down-Forward + Heavy Punch
Target Combos.notes: Can hold down the button to charge the first attack, data listed as 'no charge...max charge'. Second hit knocks down as of December 2024 patch.

Target Combos.name: Forward + Heavy Kick, Forward + Heavy Kick
Target Combos.cancel: First Hit: Special, Super Second Hit: --
Target Combos.notes: Can hold down the button to charge the first attack, data listed as 'no charge...max charge'.

Target Combos.name: Jump Medium Punch, Jump Medium Punch
Target Combos.notes: Limited Juggle State on air hit with first hit, Forced Knockdown on air hit with second hit.

Jump Attacks.name: Jump Medium Punch
Jump Attacks.notes: Limited Juggle State on air hit.

Jump Attacks.name: Jump Heavy Punch
Jump Attacks.notes: Knockdown on aerial hit. Can hold down the button to charge the attack, data listed as 'no charge...max charge'.

Jump Attacks.name: Jump Heavy Kick
Jump Attacks.notes: Can hold down the button to charge the attack, data listed as 'no charge...max charge'.

Jump Attacks.name: Caelum Arc (Neutral Jump > Down + Heavy Punch)
Jump Attacks.notes: Can hold down the button to charge the attack, data listed as 'no charge...max charge'. Crosses up.

Special Moves.name: Gladius (Light Punch)
Special Moves.notes: Charged version breaks armor. Can hold down the button to charge the attack, data listed as 'no charge...max charge'. Transitions to a two-hit attack into a hit throw when fully charged. Total frames and recovery frames listed for charge version are for whiffed hit. One hit of upper body hit armor starting at frame 5 until 3-6 frames before becoming active (affected by charge).

Special Moves.name: Gladius (Medium Punch)
Special Moves.notes: Charged version breaks armor. Can hold down the button to charge the attack, data listed as 'no charge...max charge'. Transitions to a two-hit attack into a hit throw when fully charged. Total frames and recovery frames listed for charge version are for whiffed hit. One hit of upper body hit armor starting at frame 5 until 3-6 frames before becoming active (affected by charge).

Special Moves.name: Gladius (Heavy Punch)
Special Moves.notes: Charged version breaks armor. Can hold down the button to charge the attack, data listed as 'no charge...max charge'. Transitions to a two-hit attack into a hit throw when fully charged. Total frames and recovery frames listed for charge version are for whiffed hit. One hit of upper body hit armor starting at frame 5 until 3-6 frames before becoming active (affected by charge).

Special Moves.name: Gladius (Overdrive)
Special Moves.notes: Breaks armor. Can hold down the button to charge the attack, data listed as 'no charge...max charge'. Transitions to a two-hit attack into a hit throw when fully charged. Total frames and recovery frames listed for charge version are for whiffed hit. One hit of upper body hit armor starting at frame 1 until becoming active (affected by charge). Charged version grants two hits of upper body hit armor. Adds 30% scaling in combos as of May 2024 patch.

Special Moves.name: Dimachaerus (Light Punch)
Special Moves.notes: Can followup with Forward + Punch for a second hit, listed as second hit in data.

Special Moves.name: Dimachaerus (Medium Punch)
Special Moves.notes: Can followup with Forward + Punch for a second hit, listed as second hit in data. As of June 2025 patch, Anti Air Invuln increased and is now waist-up (was previously just the head).

Special Moves.name: Dimachaerus (Heavy Punch)
Special Moves.notes: Can followup with Forward + Punch for a second hit, listed as second hit in data. Full Juggle State on hit for both hits.

Special Moves.name: Dimachaerus (Overdrive)
Special Moves.notes: Can followup with Forward + Punch for a second hit, listed as second hit in data. Full Juggle State on hit for both hits.

Special Moves.name: Phalanx (Light Punch)
Special Moves.notes: One hit of armor on frames 7-11. 6 Active frames as of December 2024 patch.

Special Moves.name: Phalanx (Medium Punch)
Special Moves.notes: One hit of armor on frames 7-13. 6 Active frames as of December 2024 patch.

Special Moves.name: Phalanx (Heavy Punch)
Special Moves.notes: One hit of armor on frames 10-15. 6 Active frames as of December 2024 patch.

Special Moves.name: Phalanx (Overdrive)
Special Moves.notes: One hit of armor on frames 6-12. Wall Splats in the corner on hit. 6 Active frames as of December 2024 patch. As of March 2026 patch: active armor frames from 7 to 12.

Special Moves.name: Scutum
Special Moves.notes: Upper body armor while active, but really wonkie and depends on the hitbox/hurtbox of the attacker (can armor Ryu cr.LP but not Juri cr.LP, for instance). Gives more advantage versus light attacks. Followup attack breaks armor (as of May 2024 patch).

Special Moves.name: Scutum (Overdrive)
Special Moves.notes: Full body armor while active. Gives more advantage versus light attacks. Followup attack breaks armor (as of May 2024 patch).

Super Arts.name: Javelin of Marisa (Level 1)
Super Arts.notes: Has two hits of full body armor on frames 2-23. Breaks armor. Charged version transitions to a parry version of the move when the armor is struck. Data listed as: Normal (Full Charge) (Parry). Counter damaged reduced from 2640 to 2400 in June 2025 patch.

Super Arts.name: Meteorite (Level 2)
Super Arts.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-16. Breaks armor. Late hit listed in parenthesis. As of June 2025 patch, can now hold left/right to adjust distance moved during attack.

Super Arts.name: Goddess of the Hunt (Level 3)
Super Arts.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-19. Breaks armor. Critical Art in parenthesis.
